description: Strict weight-index admission (defect 4): immutable-identity verification of the downloaded index bytes + duplicate-key rejection + frozen grammar, built and live-verified. Aggregate-only.

defect_4_strict_index_admission.identity: verify sha256(local index bytes) == the frozen immutable LFS object sha256 the Hub reports; fails closed on mismatch or wrong-shape identity
defect_4_strict_index_admission.grammar: duplicate JSON keys rejected at every level; top-level keys subset of {metadata, weight_map}; weight_map nonempty; tensor names nonempty strings; shard paths nonempty strings, no absolute/traversal, .safetensors only; booleans and non-strings rejected; metadata (if present) an object
defect_4_strict_index_admission.provenance_finding: the index is LFS-backed (~15 MB / 124611 tensors); its content identity is the LFS object sha256, NOT the git blob sha1 (which hashes only the small LFS pointer). The initial git-blob identity attempt correctly FAILED CLOSED before this was corrected to the LFS sha256.

remaining_blockers.defect_4_cli_wiring: route the header-gate CLI's index load through admit_weight_index (it still uses plain json.load); freeze the index descriptor {repo,rev,path,lfs_sha256,size} alongside the shard descriptors
remaining_blockers.defect_6_committed_reconciliation_cli: single committed source<->artifact reconciliation CLI used identically in tests and live
remaining_blockers.defect_7_load_manifest_equality: exact tensor names/multiplicity, quantization aux tensors (scales/qzeros/g_idx/qweight), dtype/shape, expert-axis ordering, gate/up fusion order, packed layout, and the exact numbered->packed loader conversion with zero ignored/missing/synthesized tensors under strict loading
remaining_blockers.defect_9_schema_coverage: bind exact hidden-layer + attention/DeltaNet/shared-expert/router/embed/head parameter schema to the pinned config
remaining_blockers.defect_10_source_package_identity: pin + equality-check installed Transformers package/source/class/digest/config/loader before admitting the meta-device source set

privacy: aggregate-only; counts and booleans, no sha values, tensor names, weights, caches, or local paths
